  • Classes in simpaths.model.enums used by simpaths.data
    Class
    Description
    AlignmentVariable
     
    Country
     
    DemandAdjustment
    The Demand Adjustment refers to the update of the initial labour demand at each time-step, which is derived from the equilibrium value of labour demand at the previous time-step with an adjustment to take into account such factors as population or income growth.
    Education
     
    Gender
     
    Labour
    An enumeration representing different categories of weekly labour supply (work hours) provided by persons.
    Region
     
    TargetShares
     
    TimeSeriesVariable
     
    TimeVaryingRate
